title: Never echo raw input into instruction position
description: Untrusted input is confined to a labeled data section and never concatenated into the system or instruction region.
body: Use when a template mixes fixed instructions with variable input. Do not concatenate user text directly into the system prompt or an instruction sentence, and avoid templates where input can close a delimiter and open an instruction. Actions: place untrusted input only inside a clearly delimited, labeled data block, keep system instructions in a separate fixed region, and re-assert constraints after the data. Validation signals include an injection test where input containing instruction-like text does not change behavior. Risk boundary: input that reaches instruction position can hijack the model; treat any path where raw input lands in the system region as a blocking finding.
